EXPECTED RESULT: System returns HTTP 400 Bad Request. Response body contains an error message: "Email already exists".

EXPECTED RESULT: Headers: Authorization Bearer token for a user who is not the blog owner. Path parameter: id set to the blog's ID (e.g., <blog_id_1>). Request body contains: title 'Attempted Update', content 'This should fail.'.
column8: System returns HTTP 403 Forbidden. Response body contains an error message: "Forbidden".
